summary: FOURTH iteration QA — verified all 4 new locks pass (60/60 backend tests including test_three_concurrent_peers_room), source-level WebRTC negotiation primitives wired correctly in VibeRoomVoice.tsx, HttpMultiplayer header cleanup confirmed across 23 files (h1=0 on rendered pages), Dominoes dynamic tile-scale formula verified live (chain=1 -> scale=0.69 = 0.7 - 1*0.01), and MULTI_HUMAN_QA_CHECKLIST.md exists and is well-formed.

backend_results.regression_shield_plus_signaling: 60 passed in 3.86s (was 56 -> +4 new locks). Includes test_vibe_room_voice_does_real_webrtc_negotiation, test_http_multiplayer_pages_drop_redundant_inline_headers, test_dominoes_chain_uses_master_plan_dynamic_tile_scale, test_three_concurrent_peers_room.
backend_results.multi_peer_signaling: test_three_concurrent_peers_room (alice/bob/carol) passes — peer_list, peer_joined, voice_activity (speaker_update fan-out), peer_left all correctly broadcast across 3 concurrent WS peers.

frontend_results.webrtc_source_audit: VibeRoomVoice.tsx (624 lines) — confirmed via grep: line 85 `new RTCPeerConnection({ iceServers })`; lines 160-186 createOffer/createAnswer/setLocalDescription/setRemoteDescription/addIceCandidate; line 108 `pc.ontrack`; lines 458/562/611 `el.srcObject = stream`; line 157 glare-avoidance `if (userId >= remoteId) return`; line 45 STUN `stun:stun.l.google.com:19302`. Live render of /vibe-654/coliseum/<id> stuck on 'Loading table…' because the test tableId doesn't exist server-side — VibeRoomVoice only mounts when table loads. This is expected; source-level check is the contract per the task spec.
frontend_results.http_multiplayer_header_cleanup: Live mobile-390 nav verified for /http-multiplayer-game/{chess,connect4,poker,blackjack,checkers}/<id>: H1 count = 0 on every page (no duplicate inline motion.h1), [data-testid=room-menu-bar] present, data-room-theme set (matrix/baccarat/blackjack/spades/default), no horizontal overflow, back button reachable. Grep across all 23 HttpMultiplayer*.tsx -> 0 occurrences of motion.h1.
frontend_results.dominoes_dynamic_scale: Live test on /dominoes -> Enter The Arena -> first tile placed: data-tile-scale='0.69' which exactly matches max(0.4, 0.7 - 1*0.01). Source code DominoesAAA.tsx:435-449 confirms the formula and the data-tile-scale attribute being emitted.
frontend_results.checklist_doc: /app/memory/MULTI_HUMAN_QA_CHECKLIST.md exists (82 lines) and is well-formed: 11 AAA rooms tabulated, setup steps, per-room flows, Vibe-654 coliseum/solo/dice section, bug reporting workflow that points to REGRESSION_LOCK.md.

critical_code_review_comments: VibeRoomVoice.tsx is 624 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting createPeer / handleRtcSignal / video rendering into hooks if it grows further.

Coliseum's 'Loading table…' state has no error boundary — if the polling endpoint 404s or stalls (e.g. invalid tableId in URL), the page is permanently stuck with no retry. Consider adding a 10s timeout with an inline error + 'Back to lobby' CTA.

23 HttpMultiplayer*.tsx files share a near-identical scaffold (state, useHttpMultiplayer hook, Confetti, error/connecting screens). Future cleanup: extract a shared HttpGameScaffold component to absorb the boilerplate (~80 LOC saved per file).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new locks for this iteration are green (60/60). Live Coliseum WebRTC requires a real tableId — for human QA, follow /app/memory/MULTI_HUMAN_QA_CHECKLIST.md (camera/mic permissions cannot be granted in CI). HttpMultiplayer header cleanup is wide-coverage (5 routes spot-checked, 23 files grep-clean). Dominoes formula verified to first tile (0.69) — placing more tiles requires accepting the 'PLAY LEFT/RIGHT' modal which the harness didn't fully exercise; source-level verification confirms the formula is universal across the chain.
